order.description: The order of this period in the vesting schedule.

percentage.description: The percentage of shares that vest in this period.

vestingMethod.description: The frequency at which shares vest.

vestingOccurs.description: When vesting occurs within each period (e.g., same day as start date, first of month, last of month).

length.description: The duration of the vesting period.

lengthUnit.description: The unit of the duration (days, months, years).

immediatePercentage.description: The percentage of shares that vest immediately on the vesting start date.

cliffPercentage.description: The percentage of shares that vest at the cliff.

cliffLengthUnit.description: The unit of the cliff duration (days, months, years).

milestoneName.description: The name of the milestone for milestone-based periods.

performanceCondition.description: The performance condition associated with this period.

schema_def.description: A vesting period defines a portion of shares that vest.
